zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Scales 3rd Baron Scales於1312年出生在英國諾福爾可米德萊頓時，他的父親Robert de Scales 2nd Baron Scales33歲，母親Egeline Courtenay33歲。他於大約1322年與Mrs在英國英格蘭諾福爾可費爾布利格結婚。他去世於1369年8月13日在英國諾福爾可米德萊頓享年57歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可米德萊頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Scales 3rd Baron Scales于1312年出生在英国諾福爾可米德萊頓时，他的父亲Robert de Scales 2nd Baron Scales33岁，母亲Egeline Courtenay33岁。他于大约1322年与Mrs在英国英格兰諾福爾可費爾布利格结婚。他去世于1369年8月13日在英国諾福爾可米德萊頓享年57岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可米德萊頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Scales
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: plural form of   Scale  , naming a herdsman living and working on a summer pasture, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Scales, mostly minor places in Lancashire and Yorkshire.   Scholes   is a dialect variant of the same name.

(of Norman origin): habitational name either from Écalles-Alix (Seine-Maritime), Écalles (in Estouteville-Écalles, Seine-Maritime), or from Escalles (Pas-de-Calais). The earliest spellings of these names suggest a derivation from Latin scala, scalae (plural) ‘ladder, staircase, stile’, perhaps applied to a steep slope or path, although Old Norse skáli (‘herdsman's hut, shieling’, see Scale ) has also been suggested for Écalles. Challis may be a variant of the same name. The surname has also been established in southern Ireland (Limerick) since the 14th century.

variants.name: Scholes
meanings: English: habitational name from one or other of the places called Scholes in Lancashire and Yorkshire, or from Scole in Norfolk, all named with Middle English scole or scoles ‘herdsman's hut(s)’ (Old Norse skáli). In northern England the name was sometimes interchangeable with Scales , a dialect variant of the same word.

variants.name: Scale
meanings: English: from northern Middle English scale ‘herdsman's hut, shed, shieling’ (Old Norse skáli). The surname may have denoted a herdsman who lived and worked on a summer pasture or someone from any of several mostly minor places so named in Lancashire and Yorkshire. The name often varies between singular and plural forms; see Scales .

variants.name: Schooley
meanings: English (Sussex): variant of Scholey, a habitational name either from Scholey's Bridge in Hemsworth (Yorkshire) or the lost Scholey in Rastrick (Yorkshire), recorded in that spelling in 1399. The placenames derive from Old Norse skáli ‘(temporary) hut, shed, shieling’ + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scales .

variants.name: Schoolcraft
meanings: English: variant of Scowcroft, from Middle English scale, sc(h)ole ‘hut, shed’ (Old Norse skáli) + croft ‘small enclosed field’. The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in or by a field containing a hut, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Scowcroft in Oldham (Lancashire) and Scholecroft in Morley (Yorkshire). Compare Scales and Schofield .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Scales 3rd Baron Scales was born in 1312, in Middleton, Norfolk, England, his father, Robert de Scales 2nd Baron Scales, was 33 and his mother, Egeline Courtenay, was 33. He married Mrs about 1322, in Felbrigg, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. He died on 13 August 1369, in Middleton, Norfolk, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Middleton, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Scales 3rd Baron Scales est né en 1312, à Middleton, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Scales 2nd Baron Scales, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Egeline Courtenay, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Mrs environ 1322, à Felbrigg, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 13 août 1369, à Middleton, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Middleton, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Scales 3rd Baron Scales 1312 in Middleton, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Scales 2nd Baron Scales 33 und seine Mutter Egeline Courtenay 33. Er hat um 1322 in Felbrigg, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Mrs geheiratet. Er starb am 13. August 1369 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Middleton, Norfolk, England und wurde in Middleton, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Scales 3rd Baron Scales è nato il nel 1312 nel Middleton, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Robert de Scales 2nd Baron Scales, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Egeline Courtenay, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Mrs circa 1322, nel Felbrigg, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 13 agosto 1369, nel Middleton, Norfolk, England, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Middleton, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Scales 3rd Baron Scalesが1312年にイギリスノーフォルクミッドレトンで生まれた時，父Robert de Scales 2nd Baron Scalesは33歳，母Egeline Courtenayは33歳であった。約1322年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクフエルブリググでMrsと結婚した。彼は1369年8月13日にイギリスノーフォルクミッドレトンで57歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクミッドレトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Scales 3rd Baron Scales(이)가 1312년 영국 노르폴크 미들레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Scales 2nd Baron Scales(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Egeline Courtenay(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1322년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 프브리그에서 Mrs(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1369년 8월 13일 영국 노르폴크 미들레턴에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 미들레턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Scales 3rd Baron Scales nasceu em 1312, em Middleton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Scales 2nd Baron Scales, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Egeline Courtenay, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs aproximadamente 1322, em Felbrigg, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 13 de agosto de 1369, em Middleton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Middleton, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Scales 3rd Baron Scales родился в 1312 г. в местности миддлетон, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Scales 2nd Baron Scales было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Egeline Courtenay, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs около 1322 г. в местности фелбриг, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 13 августа 1369 г. в местности миддлетон, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности миддлетон, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Scales 3rd Baron Scales nació en 1312, en Middleton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Scales 2nd Baron Scales, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Egeline Courtenay, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Mrs aproximadamente 1322, en Felbrigg, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 13 de agosto de 1369, en Middleton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Middleton, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
